# Copilot Instructions

Repository-level instructions for GitHub Copilot.

## Documentation

Documentation organization rules are defined in [documentation.instructions.md](./instructions/documentation.instructions.md) and apply automatically when working with files under `docs/`.

## Prompt Workflows

Prompt management rules are defined in [prompt-management.instructions.md](./instructions/prompt-management.instructions.md) and apply automatically when working with write/fix/save prompt lifecycle files under `.github/prompts/`.
